/CAL:TRIAL & SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/FTRRECORDED/SAWD/ACM/DEF:IS TO REPORT TO ACM 3 TIMES PER WEEK AND PROVICE PROOF OF CONNECTION TO CITY WIDE//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/LDTR:03-24-22 (GC COVID19)/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/DOP/
